testCases.title: Test Cases
testCases.subTitle: Click to set the test case to the input.

output.title: Output
output.subTitle: View the output of your code here.

output.label: Output
output.copyThisCaseTip: Copy output of this test case

testCase.label: Test Case
testCase.setInputTip: Set Input to this Test Case

editDialog.title: Edit Test Case
editDialog.inputPlaceholder: Stdin input here for this test case.
editDialog.expectedPlaceholder: Expected output here for auto verification. (Optional)

alertDialog.title: Received Test Case from Extension
alertDialog.description:
Test case {{problemName}} has been received. Would
you like to overwrite or insert the new test cases?

alert.title: A new test case has been received
alert.description: Test case {{problemName}} has been received. It has been added to the test case list.

headerActions.shareCodeTip: Share your code, input/output, and test cases with others

turnstile.verificationFailedDesc: Failed to verify Turnstile token. Please try again later.
turnstile.unsupportedDesc: Your browser does not support Turnstile. Please use a modern browser.
turnstile.errorDesc: An error occurred during Turnstile verification. Please try reloading the page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.defaultCodeDesc: Set the current code as default.
settings.resetSettingsDesc: Reset all settings to default values.

shareReceive.title: Receive Shared Code
shareReceive.description: Please select the parts you want to receive.
shareReceive.descriptionSub: They'll replace the current content in your editor.
shareReceive.receiveFailedDesc: An error occurred while receiving the shared code. Please try again later.
shareReceive.receiveSuccessDesc: The shared code has been received and applied to your editor.
